welcome: Welcome to OpenCode Telegram Bot! Send me a prompt to start coding.
tts_on: Text-to-speech enabled. Replies will include audio.
help:
Available Commands:

/status — Server and session info
/new — Create a new session
/abort — Abort current task
/sessions — Browse recent sessions
/projects — Switch projects
/tts — Toggle audio replies
/rename — Rename current session
/commands — Run custom commands
/task — Create a scheduled task
/tasklist — Manage scheduled tasks
/opencode_start — Start OpenCode server
/opencode_stop — Stop OpenCode server
/help — Show this help

Send any text message as a prompt to the coding agent.
unauthorized: Access denied. You are not authorized to use this bot.
server_not_running: OpenCode server is not running. Start it with /opencode_start or manually run `opencode serve`.
no_session: No active session. Create one with /new or send a message.
voice_not_configured: Voice transcription is not configured. Set STT_API_URL and STT_API_KEY.
config_prompt_password: Enter OpenCode server password (leave empty if none):
config_reset: Configuration reset. Please restart the bot.
